evidence_direction_note: [update_z_goal_typeerror_swallowed] Diagnosed 2026-05-07: experiment script called agent.update_z_goal(latent, benefit_exposure=..., drive_level=...) which raised TypeError every tick; bare except wrapper silently swallowed it. GoalState.update never called -> goal_state.is_active() always False -> z_goal stayed at 0 -> MECH-295 bridge precondition unmet. Confirmed by per-seed results: goal_active_ticks=0, goal_norm_max=0, bridge_n_write_fires_total=0, approach_commit_count=0 across all 6 seeds even though base_drive_mean=0.75 and override_mean=0.56 -- the override regulator and drive accumulator were both functioning. Same cohort bugs as EXQ-471/475/483/483a/483b/490/490b/490c/490e/524: 2x agent.sense() per warmup step, agent.update_residue() never called, dACC bias diagnostic reading wrong tensor. Awaiting StepHarness re-run as EXQ-490g.
